headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump goes from opening the Strait of Hormuz to blockading it
summary: The failed peace talks left investors on edge with little visibility on how the blockade will be implemented, and how long and deep an oil shock needs to be priced in.

raw.headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump goes from opening the Strait of Hormuz to blockading it
raw.summary: The failed peace talks left investors on edge with little visibility on how the blockade will be implemented, and how long and deep an oil shock needs to be priced in.

headline: The Second Year of President Donald Trump’s Term Has a Pattern — Here’s What It Means for Stocks
summary: So far in 2026, the S&P 500 is down less than 1% year-to-date after posting a solid 17.9% total return in 2025. It’s not terrible, but according to CFRA Research, this is the weakest first-year start for any new presidential term in the last two decades. If you invested through Donald Trump’s first term, this ... The Second Year of President Donald Trump’s Term Has a Pattern — Here’s What It Means for Stocks

headline: SpaceX Launches More Rockets Than Anyone Else in the World. Here Is What That Means for Its IPO
summary: SpaceX also offers the cheapest prices, and the best profit margins in space.
